source: netztransparenz.de redispatch WebAPI — renewable curtailment (measures reducing feed-in of renewable plants, GESAMTE_ARBEIT_MWH)
methodology: Each measure's total energy attributed to its start day, grouped in Europe/Berlin local time.

cost_estimate.method: ESTIMATE — curtailed MWh × a reference compensation rate. The redispatch feed reports volume, not EinsMan compensation cost, which varies by plant and year; this is an order-of-magnitude proxy, not the billed figure.
cost_estimate.eu_context_note: EU 2024 curtailment cost ~€7.2bn across 7 countries — external context, a different scope; not this DE-only series.
